home.title: Everything you need to
home.subtitle: Payments, invoicing, and payouts made simple, secure, and fast.
home.trustedBy: Trusted by leading businesses across the region

productSuite.title: Product Suite
productSuite.description: GoPay is a comprehensive B2B billing and collection ecosystem designed to streamline payment processes, drive cash flow visibility, and ensure regulatory compliance in Saudi Arabia. Below are the key products and their business value:

gopay.title: GoPay - Core Collections Platform
gopay.description: GoPay is the flagship SADAD-integrated solution for issuing invoices and collecting payments across all sectors.

goinvoice.title: GoInvoice – ZATCA-Compliant E-Invoicing
goinvoice.description: GoInvoice enables organizations to issue, archive, and report VAT-compliant invoices in line with ZATCA Phase 1 and 2.

gosplit.title: GoSplit - Multi-Payout Mechanism
gosplit.description: For marketplaces, gig platforms, or commission-based models, GoSplit distributes funds to multiple beneficiaries in real-time.

goonline.title: GoOnline - E-commerce Gateway (via Partnerships)
goonline.description: GoOnline allows merchants to accept digital payments online using a secure and scalable gateway.

gopayPlus.title: GoPay+ - Enterprise Financial Orchestration
gopayPlus.description: GoPay+ is a corporate-grade automation layer that digitizes and unifies receivables, payments, and reconciliation.

impact.title: Real Impact
impact.description: GoPay and GoPay+ practically cuts effort and days outstanding while realizing measurable savings straight onto the bottom line

paymentSuccessRate.title: Payment Success Rate
paymentSuccessRate.description: Auto-notifications and easier payment channels boost on-time collections
paymentSuccessRate.metricLabel: more invoices cleared on or before due date

dso.title: Days-Sales-Outstanding (DSO)
dso.description: Faster cash-conversion improves working capital by ~ SAR 1M per 100M turnover

costPerCollection.title: Cost-per-collection
costPerCollection.description: Fixed, low SADAD rails replace percentage card fees and banking charges

financeTeamProductivity.title: Finance-team productivity
financeTeamProductivity.description: Headcount freed for analysis, budgeting, and growth tasks

reconciliationEffort.title: Reconciliation effort
reconciliationEffort.description: Finance staff spend minutes, not hours, closing the day-book

complianceOverhead.title: Compliance Overhead
complianceOverhead.description: Built in E-Invoice archive and SADAD traceability remove manual filing
complianceOverhead.metricLabel: less time preparing ZATCA / audit reports

security.title: Bank-Level Security
security.description: Your transactions are protected with enterprise-grade encryption and compliance standards

speed.title: Lightning Fast Payments
speed.description: Process payments instantly with our optimized infrastructure

global.title: Global Coverage
global.description: Accept payments in multiple currencies from customers worldwide

whyClients.description: Discover how AI automation enhances efficiency, reduces costs, and drives business growth with smarter, faster processes.

easyToUse.title: Easy to Use
easyToUse.description: GoPay simplifies payments and invoicing with an intuitive interface, no technical skills required.

allInOne.title: All-in-One Platform
allInOne.description: Manage invoices and transfers in one place with all the tools to run payments seamlessly.

smartScalable.title: Smart, Scalable Technology
smartScalable.description: GoPay automates workflows to boost efficiency and scale businesses of any size.

flexible.title: Flexible for Any Business
flexible.description: GoPay adapts to any business, customizable for your industry and scale.

developers.title: Designed for Developers
developers.description: Developers can integrate and customize payments easily with GoPay's clear APIs and SDKs.

licensed.title: Licensed & Secure
licensed.description: Licensed by the Saudi Central Bank and SADAD, ensuring secure, compliant transactions.

gopaySolutions.subtitle: Discover how GoPay can transform your business

developers.subtitle: Welcome to the GoPay Developer Portal, your gateway to seamless integration of GoPay's billing and payment solutions with your applications and business systems.

card.title: API Documentation
card.description: Start integrating with our RESTful APIs using secure authentication protocols and comprehensive documentation.

developers.heading: Start Integrating
developers.description: Build seamless payment and billing experiences with GoPay's developer-friendly APIs. Automate invoicing, integrate with SADAD, and trigger real-time SMS/email alerts. Use our sandbox to test, explore Postman collections, and connect via REST APIs.
